title: session-57 の live-run を検証し failure metadata と既知リスクを切り分ける
goal: session-57 を live-run で再実行し、report.json に failure_type と failure metadata が正しく出力されることを確認し、失敗時は session-66 起因か既知リスク起因かを分類できるようにする
objective: live-run 完走確認と failure metadata 検証
constraints: this session is verification-only unless a separate repair session is explicitly created
no source code changes are allowed in this session
live-run must be executed on sandbox/session-67-liverun
existing untracked file backend/tests/test_live_api_validation.py must not be treated as a session-67 change

completion_criteria.condition: session-57 live-run is executed and artifacts/session-57/report.json is generated
report.json is checked for failure_layer, stop_stage, retryable, cause_summary, and top-level failure_type
if live-run fails, the cause is classified as A session-66 origin, B known-risk origin, or C new cause
no source code files are changed in this session

review_points: 副作用なし（既存破壊なし）
merge_requirements: git diff --name-only must be empty for tracked source files
verification summary must include A/B/C classification when live-run fails
